_comment: Conflict resolution convention: LOWER priority number = HIGHER authority. When the same property appears in multiple sources, the source with priority=1 wins on conflicting fields.
_business_rule: DORE > FNF > S2L > Local Brokers  (DORE has richest metadata → rank 1)

sources.label: Dore
sources.notes: Primary source. Richest metadata — rents, availability dates, furnishing detail. Authoritative for most fields.

sources.label: Fully Furnished & Fitted
sources.notes: Specialist luxury channel. Furnishing status and FnF classification are authoritative from this source.

sources.label: Sell2Live
sources.notes: Aggregated platform feed. Price and area figures are cross-check references; defer to dore on conflicts.

sources.label: Local Brokers
sources.notes: WhatsApp forwards from individual brokers. All records require manual review before promotion to master.

field_overrides._comment: Per-field source overrides that supersede the global priority order.

deduplication._comment: Composite key used to detect duplicate records across sources.
